title: dortmanna depressa
intro: Dortmanna depressa, also known as the Dwarf Spatterdock or Dwarf Yellow Water-lily, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Nymphaeaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Dortmanna depressa include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy by drying the leaves and flowers, and then using them to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
